description: Evaluation rubric for intent classification task

accuracy.description: Fraction of examples where predicted intent matches expected_intent exactly

format_valid_rate.description: Fraction of responses that return valid JSON with required fields

avg_confidence.description: Mean confidence score across all responses where JSON was valid

requires_human_review_rate.description: Fraction of examples flagged as requiring human review

per_intent_accuracy.description: Accuracy broken down by expected intent
